questions.question: Who wrote the letter to the Romans?
Paul said he was not ashamed of the gospel because it is what?
options: The power of God for salvation
questions.answer: The power of God for salvation

questions.question: Paul had already visited Rome when he wrote this letter.
For in it is revealed God's righteousness from faith to faith. As it is written, 'The righteous shall live by _____.
For the invisible things of him since the creation of the world are clearly seen, being perceived through the things that are _____, even his everlasting power and divinity.
